# anypoint_private_space_transit_gateway (Data Source)

Reads one transit gateway attachment on a private space, by transit gateway id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anypoint_private_space_transit_gateway" "tgw" {
  org_id             = var.root_org
  private_space_id   = "7f747999-a9bb-41d5-bfe8-d6b8cca68c62"
  transit_gateway_id = "tgw-017e20b9ce00c865c"
}

output "tgw_status" {
  value = data.anypoint_private_space_transit_gateway.tgw.status_attachment
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `org_id` (String)
- `private_space_id` (String)
- `transit_gateway_id` (String) The AWS transit gateway id (tgw-...).

### Read-Only

- `account_id` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String)
- `region` (String)
- `resource_share_account` (String)
- `resource_share_id` (String)
- `routes` (List of String)
- `space_name` (String)
- `status_attachment` (String)
- `status_gateway` (String)
- `tgw_resource_url` (String)
